_meta.description: Section layout library — layout varijante za About, Services, Gallery, Portfolio, Testimonials, How-it-works sekcije. Koristi umjesto uvijek istog 3-column card grida.
_meta.usage: Za svaki tip sekcije, odaberi random varijantu iz odgovarajućeg poola. Ovo je KEY za vizualnu raznolikost između projekata.

about.description: Layout varijante za About / O nama sekciju

split-50-50.description: Tekst lijevo, slika desno (ili obrnuto). Klasično, čitljivo.

big-quote.description: Veliki quote/misija tekst zauzima cijelu širinu, ispod njega kolone sa detaljiima. Impactful.

css.bottom_grid: grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); margin-top: 60px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 60px

stacked-fullwidth.name: Stacked Fullwidth
stacked-fullwidth.description: Sekcija sa slikom koja pokriva cijelu širinu (header-style), ispod nje tekst i stats. Kinematski.
stacked-fullwidth.layout: fullwidth slika (70vh), ispod container sa tekstom i 4 stana

css.image: width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top
css.content_card: background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 60px; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; position: relative; z-index: 2

persona-cards.name: Persona Cards
persona-cards.description: Umjesto texta o firmi — istaknuta kartica osnivača sa fotografijom, bio, i quote. Personalniji pristup.
persona-cards.layout: 1 velika kartica 2/3 ekrana centrirana, sa foto lijevo i bio desno unutar kartice

css.card: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 300px 1fr; gap: 48px; align-items: center; max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 48px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius)
css.quote: font-size: 1.2rem; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 24px; color: var(--text)
css.name: font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px

services.description: Layout varijante za Services / Usluge sekciju

three-columns.name: 3 Column Grid
three-columns.description: Standard 3 kartice u redu. Jasno, skenabilno.
three-columns.note: Koristi cards.json varijantu za stil kartice

alternating-rows.name: Alternating Rows
alternating-rows.description: Svaka usluga je cijeli red — slika/vizual naizmjenično lijevo/desno. Detaljniji pristup.
alternating-rows.layout: svaki .service-item je grid 1fr 1fr, neparni imaju sliku lijevo, parni desno

css.item: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center; padding: 80px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border)

tabbed-services.name: Tabbed / Accordion Services
tabbed-services.description: Tab navigacija za usluge — klik na naziv prikazuje detalje desno. Puno usluga = čisto.
tabbed-services.layout: lijeva kolona = tab lista (1/3), desna = aktivan sadržaj (2/3)

css.wrapper: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; gap: 60px; align-items: flex-start
css.tab: padding: 16px 20px; cursor: pointer; border-left: 2px solid transparent; transition: all 0.2s
css.tab_active: border-left-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary); background: var(--surface)

numbered-list.name: Numbered List (Big)
numbered-list.description: Usluge kao numerisana lista sa velikim brojevima. Jednostavno i dramatično.
numbered-list.layout: svaki item = horizontalni red, veliki broj lijevo, naslov i opis desno, tankom linijom odvojen

css.item: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr; gap: 32px; padding: 40px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); align-items: flex-start
css.number: font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem); font-weight: 900; font-family: var(--font-display); color: var(--primary); line-height: 1
css.title: font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px

gallery.description: Layout varijante za Gallery / Portfolio sekciju

masonry.name: CSS Masonry / Pinterest Grid
masonry.description: Kolumne različitih visina. Slike se slažu prirodno bez jednake visine. Dinamično.

css.item: break-inside: avoid; margin-bottom: 16px; border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden

featured-grid.name: Featured + Grid
featured-grid.description: Jedan veliki featured item (span 2 kolone), ostali u regularnom gridu. Hijerarhija.
featured-grid.layout: grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); .featured { grid-column: span 2; grid-row: span 2; }

horizontal-scroll-gallery.name: Horizontal Scroll Gallery
horizontal-scroll-gallery.description: Galerija koja se scrolla horizontalno (overflow-x: scroll). Prikazuje više bez vertikalnog prostora.
horizontal-scroll-gallery.layout: display: flex; gap: 20px; overflow-x: auto; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; padding: 20px 0

css.wrapper: overflow-x: auto; display: flex; gap: 20px; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; padding: 0 24px 20px; scrollbar-width: thin; cursor: grab;
css.item: flex-shrink: 0; width: calc(33vw - 32px); aspect-ratio: 3/2; scroll-snap-align: start; overflow: hidden; border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid var(--border);

horizontal-scroll-gallery.html_skeleton: [...]

fullscreen-slideshow.name: Fullscreen Slideshow
fullscreen-slideshow.description: Jedna slika punokranana, strelice za navigaciju. Dramatično, fokusirano.
fullscreen-slideshow.layout: position: relative; height: 80vh; .slide je apsolutno pozicioniran, opacity 0/1 tranzicija

css.slideshow: position: relative; height: 80vh; overflow: hidden; border-radius: var(--radius);
css.slide: position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.7s ease;
css.nav_btn: position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); border: none; color: #fff; width: 48px; height: 48px; cursor: pointer; z-index: 2;
